title: Hermes Agent Desktop + FREE APIs: This is ACTUALLY ONE OF THE BEST AGENT APPS!
summary: Hermes Agent Desktop is a desktop application that provides a visual interface for Hermes Agent, featuring session management, skill catalogs, messaging platform integrations (Slack, Discord, Telegram, Teams, WhatsApp, Signal, Email), cron scheduling, subagent orchestration, and multi-model support across Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, Nous, and OpenRouter.
